steps.title: Use the graph directly
steps.content: The question does not ask for the inequality equation. It only asks which ordered pair is in the shaded region, so plot or locate each answer choice on the graph.

steps.title: Test answer choices
steps.content:
• A $(-5,-6)$ is outside the shaded region.
  • B $(-2,5)$ is outside the shaded region.
  • C $(1,4)$ is outside the shaded region.
  • D $(6,-2)$ is inside the shaded region.
The only plotted choice in the shaded region is $(6,-2)$, so choice D is correct.
